Data and Analysis
=================

.. todo::
   Document how piec saves data, the output file format, how to reload saved data, and how to
   use the ``piec.analysis`` functions for post-processing.

   Suggested sections:

   * **Output file format** — file type (CSV, HDF5, etc.), column names, units.
   * **Save directory structure** — how files are named and organized when ``save_dir`` is set.
   * **Reloading data** — how to read saved files back into Python for further analysis.
   * **Analysis functions** — overview of ``piec.analysis`` and links to the API docs for
     ``piec.analysis.hysteresis``, ``piec.analysis.pund``, etc.
   * **Plotting** — how to reproduce or customize plots from saved data.
